footer.description: Our identity is born from "Pitz", a Mayan term that consecrates the ball game as a ritual and cosmogonic act. More than a shield, our emblem is a visual dialogue between the ancestral "Ollamaliztli" —where life and cosmos were decided on the field— and the euphoria of contemporary football. We embody the perpetual motion of the rubber sphere, a heritage of honor and community that today, under our banner, reunites Mexico with the world.
footer.copyright: PITZBOL PROJECT - ROAD TO THE 2026 WORLD CUP

support.title: Support & Contact
support.subtitle: Have questions or need help? We'd love to hear from you. Contact us through any available channel.
support.name: Name
support.subject: Subject
support.emailCardDescription: Send us an email and we'll respond within the next 24 hours.
support.callCardDescription: Complete the form with your number and reason. We'll contact you during our office hours: Monday to Friday 9am-6pm.
support.howPreferContact: How would you prefer to contact us?
support.formDescription: Complete the form and we'll get back to you as soon as possible.
support.messageSentText: Thank you for contacting us. We'll get back to you shortly.
support.phoneHint: We'll contact you at this number during our office hours.
support.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more details about your inquiry...
support.callFormDescription: Leave your information and we'll contact you by phone during our office hours (Mon-Fri 9am-6pm).
support.callRequestText: We'll contact you soon at the number provided.
support.callReasonPlaceholder: Briefly tell us the reason for your call...
support.callHint: We'll call you at this number during business hours.
support.faqQ1: How can I create an account?
support.faqA1: Click "Sign In" in the main menu and follow the steps to register. It's completely free.
support.faqQ2: When will I receive a response?
support.faqA2: We typically respond within 24 hours during business days. For urgent inquiries, select "Request Call".
support.faqQ3: Which inquiry category should I choose?
support.faqA3: Select the category that best describes your inquiry. If you're not sure, choose "General Inquiry" or "Other".
support.faqQ4: Where can I report a technical issue?
support.faqA4: Use the contact form and select "Technical Issue". Describe the error you encountered in detail.
support.faqQ5: What is the phone support schedule?
support.faqA5: Our team is available Monday to Friday, 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM (Guadalajara Time).
support.faqA6: Of course! Select "Business Partnerships" in the form and tell us about your business or proposal.

aboutUs.title: About Us
aboutUs.subtitle: Connecting cultures through football
aboutUs.heroSubtitle: Connecting the Mayan past with the future of world soccer
aboutUs.missionContent: At PITZBOL, our mission is to transform the experience of soccer fans during the 2026 World Cup in Mexico. We create meaningful connections between visitors and Mexico's rich sports culture, facilitating the discovery of iconic places, authentic experiences, and unique events that celebrate our soccer heritage.
aboutUs.visionContent: To be the leading platform that unites the passion for soccer with cultural tourism in Mexico, positioning ourselves as the essential bridge between international visitors and authentic local experiences. We aspire for every fan visiting Mexico to have an unforgettable experience that transcends the stadium.
aboutUs.storyP1: PITZBOL was born from a profound vision that connects two worlds: the ancient Mayan ball game, the "Pitz", and the modern soccer that captivates the entire planet. Our name is no coincidence; it's a tribute to the rich Mesoamerican sports tradition that saw the game as a sacred act, a ritual that united communities and celebrated life.
aboutUs.storyHighlight: "More than a shield, our emblem is a visual dialogue between the ancestral Ollamaliztli —where life and the cosmos were decided on the field— and the euphoria of contemporary soccer."
aboutUs.storyP2: With the arrival of the 2026 World Cup, we saw a unique opportunity: to create a platform that not only guides visitors to the stadiums, but immerses them in the complete cultural experience that Mexico has to offer. Each match is a gateway to the gastronomy, art, music, and traditions that make our country an extraordinary destination.
aboutUs.storyP3: Developed by CETI Colomos students committed to technological innovation and national pride, PITZBOL represents the perpetual motion of the rubber sphere: a heritage of honor and community that today, under our digital banner, once again unites Mexico with the world.
aboutUs.valuePassionDesc: We love soccer and our culture. This passion drives every feature of our platform.
aboutUs.valueInclusionDesc: We believe in a soccer that unites all people, regardless of their origin or language.
aboutUs.valueExcellenceDesc: We strive to offer the best possible experience in every interaction.
aboutUs.valueTraditionDesc: We honor our roots while embracing the future of the sport.
aboutUs.valueCommunityDesc: We build bridges between visitors and locals to create authentic connections.
aboutUs.valueInnovationDesc: We use cutting-edge technology to constantly improve our platform.
aboutUs.teamDescription: We are a team of passionate students from CETI Colomos, united by our love for soccer and pride in Mexico. Our project was born from the desire to show the world the cultural richness of our country during the 2026 World Cup.
aboutUs.ctaDescription: Discover everything Mexico has to offer during the 2026 World Cup

privacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
privacyPolicy.commitmentContent: At PITZBOL, we respect and protect the privacy of all our users. This Privacy Policy describes how we collect, use, share, and protect your personal information when you use our platform.
privacyPolicy.collectionIntro: To provide you with the best experience, we collect the following types of information:
privacyPolicy.collectionAccount: Account information: Name, email, phone number, and encrypted password.
privacyPolicy.collectionUsage: Usage information: Interactions with the platform, searches performed, favorite places, and event calendar.
privacyPolicy.collectionLocation: Location information: With your consent, we may access your location to show you nearby places.
privacyPolicy.collectionTechnical: Technical data: IP address, browser type, operating system, and session cookies.
privacyPolicy.usageIntro: We use your personal information for the following purposes:
privacyPolicy.usage1: Create and manage your user account
privacyPolicy.usage3: Provide recommendations for places and sports events
privacyPolicy.usage4: Process your favorites and manage your calendar
privacyPolicy.usage5: Improve our services through usage analysis
privacyPolicy.usage6: Communicate with you about updates and news
privacyPolicy.sharingIntro: We do not sell or rent your personal information to third parties. We only share information in the following cases:
privacyPolicy.sharingProviders: Service providers: With companies that help us operate the platform (hosting, analytics, technical support).
privacyPolicy.sharingPartners: Business partners: With affiliated businesses and guides that appear on the platform, only to facilitate your bookings and inquiries.
privacyPolicy.sharingLegal: Legal compliance: When required by law or to protect our legal rights.
privacyPolicy.securityContent: We implement technical and organizational security measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, loss, or alteration.
privacyPolicy.security2: Secure HTTPS connections throughout the platform
privacyPolicy.rightsIntro: As a PITZBOL user, you have the following rights:
privacyPolicy.rightsAccess: Access: Request a copy of your personal information
privacyPolicy.rightsDeletion: Deletion: Request deletion of your account and personal data
privacyPolicy.rightsPortability: Portability: Receive your data in a structured format
privacyPolicy.rightsObjection: Objection: Object to the processing of your data for certain purposes
privacyPolicy.rightsContact: To exercise any of these rights, contact us through our support email.
privacyPolicy.cookiesContent: We use cookies and similar technologies to improve your experience, remember your preferences, and analyze platform usage. You can manage your cookie preferences from your browser settings.
privacyPolicy.footerText: This policy may be updated periodically to reflect changes in our practices.

guideInfo.title: Become a Pitzbol Guide!
guideInfo.subtitle: Are you passionate about showing your city?
guideInfo.description: Becoming a guide at Pitzbol is much more than just accompanying tourists: it's sharing your story, your culture and your passion with people from all over the world.
guideInfo.whatCanYouDo: What will you be able to do as a guide?

benefits.publishTours: Publish your own tours or simply offer yourself as a personal guide for tourists.
benefits.manageTours: Manage your tours, schedules and availability easily.
benefits.appearOnMap: Appear on the tour map so you can be easily found.
benefits.chatWithClients: Chat directly with clients to answer questions and coordinate details.
benefits.publicProfile: Have a public profile ready to customize and highlight your strengths.
benefits.securePayments: Receive secure payments and keep track of your income from your digital wallet.
benefits.ratings: Be rated by users and build your reputation as a local guide.

guideInfo.reminder: Remember: all tours you publish will be reviewed and approved by an administrator to ensure the best experience for travelers.
guideInfo.identityVerification: To confirm your identity, have the following documents on hand:

documents.ine: INE (voter ID front and back) valid.
documents.ineNote: You can also upload your passport if you are a foreigner. You can edit your photo in your profile later.
documents.bankAccount: Bank statement (proof showing your interbank CLABE).
documents.bankNote: We need to confirm your account to send you payments for your tours.

businessInfo.title: Publish Your Business on Pitzbol!
businessInfo.subtitle: Do you want your business to stand out to thousands of tourists?
businessInfo.description: Publishing your establishment on Pitzbol allows you to reach more people, manage your services and leverage AI technology to attract customers.
businessInfo.whatCanYouDo: What will you be able to do as a business?

benefits.uploadBusiness: Upload and manage your businesses or establishments.
benefits.manageBusiness: Manage your businesses, hours and availability.
benefits.appearOnMap: Appear on the Places map with greater relevance thanks to the subscription.
benefits.aiPriority: Your business will have priority in the personalized itineraries that AI recommends to tourists.
benefits.wallet: Wallet for subscription payments and collections.
benefits.ratings: Be rated by users and build your reputation.

businessInfo.requiredInfo: You will be asked for the following data and files to register your business:

requirements.images: At least 3 images for the establishment gallery

businessInfo.reminder: Remember: all published businesses will be reviewed and approved by an administrator to ensure the best experience for travelers.
businessInfo.subscriptionInfo: Once approved, your business will appear on the map, but if you want more visibility and for AI to recommend it in personalized itineraries, you must subscribe to a plan.
